filters.description: Filter criteria — same shape as the list endpoint's query params. Mutually exclusive with `ids`. Use this to bulk-delete by search/active/tags/etc. instead of supplying explicit IDs.

active.description:
Filter by active state.

* `true` - true
* `false` - false
* `STALE` - STALE

created_by_id.description: Filter to flags created by a specific user ID.

evaluation_runtime.description:
Filter by evaluation runtime.

* `server` - Server
* `client` - Client
* `all` - All

excluded_properties.description: JSON-encoded property filter to exclude. Same shape as the list endpoint.

has_evaluation_contexts.description: When true, only matches flags with at least one evaluation context.

search.description: Search by feature flag key or name (case-insensitive).

tags.description: Tag names to filter by. Flags carrying at least one of these tags match.

type.description:
Filter by flag type.

* `boolean` - boolean
* `multivariant` - multivariant
* `experiment` - experiment
* `remote_config` - remote_config

ids.description: Explicit feature flag IDs to soft-delete. Mutually exclusive with `filters`.
